query:
SELECT
            "publicAccessLevel" as "access_level!"
            FROM "SharePermission"
            WHERE id in (SELECT share_permission_id
            FROM calls
            WHERE id = $1
            UNION ALL
            SELECT share_permission_id
            FROM call_records
            WHERE id = $1
            LIMIT 1)
            AND "isPublic" = true
            AND "publicAccessLevel" IS NOT NULL
